ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the passenger survived (1) or not (0) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Class of the passenger's ticket (1st, 2nd, or 3rd) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings or spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port where the passenger embarked */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for emergency purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the passenger has */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any allergies the passenger has */,
  "travel_insurance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger has travel insurance */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket FOREIGN KEY ("ticket") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin FOREIGN KEY ("cabin") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* The actual ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare associated with the ticket */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Class of the ticket (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* The date when the ticket was booked */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* The status of the ticket (e.g., booked, paid, canceled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method used to pay for the ticket */,
  "travel_agency" TEXT /* The travel agency that booked the ticket */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* The name of the travel agent who booked the ticket */,
  "additional_services" TEXT /* Any additional services booked with the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck on which the cabin is located */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger assigned to this cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* The type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "cabin_size" REAL /* The size of the cabin in square meters */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* A list of amenities available in the cabin */,
  "cabin_price" REAL /* The price of the cabin */,
  "cabin_view" TEXT /* The view from the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation port */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the port */,
  "port_capacity" INTEGER /* The maximum number of passengers the port can handle at once */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic record */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Class of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Rate of survival for this group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Categorization of passengers into age groups */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "embarked_port" TEXT /* Embarkation port of the passenger */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin assigned to the passenger */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the passenger has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES passengers ("pclass")
)

CREATE TABLE "siblings_spouses" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sibling/spouse record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "sibsp_count" INTEGER /* Number of siblings or spouses aboard */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relation (e.g., sibling, spouse) */,
  "relation_name" TEXT /* Name of the sibling or spouse */,
  "relation_age" REAL /* Age of the sibling or spouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_siblings_spouses_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents_children" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent/child record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "parch_count" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relation (e.g., parent, child) */,
  "relation_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent or child */,
  "relation_age" REAL /* Age of the parent or child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parents_children_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "voyage_date" TEXT /* Date of the voyage */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the voyage */,
  "survivors" INTEGER /* Number of survivors from the voyage */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the voyage */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the ship */,
  "actual_passengers" INTEGER /* Actual number of passengers on the voyage */,
  "total_crew" INTEGER /* Total number of crew members on the voyage */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the voyage */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the voyage */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the voyage in hours */,
  "emergency_situations" TEXT /* Any emergency situations that occurred during the voyage */,
  "crew_response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the crew during emergencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
